title: tetrapterys tysonii
intro: Tetrapterys tysonii, also known as Tyson's wings or Tyson's four-winged plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Tetrapterys tysonii include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
